desc.en: I design and build scalable digital products, creating robust backend services with NestJS and Go, fast and responsive user experiences with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, and reliable data-driven solutions powered by MySQL and TypeScript.
desc.es: Diseño y desarrollo productos digitales escalables, creando servicios backend robustos con NestJS y Go, experiencias web rápidas y responsivas con Next.js y Tailwind CSS, y soluciones orientadas a datos utilizando MySQL y TypeScript.
